sql_overrides.sql_query:
-----------------------------------
-- COST INTERCOMPANY
-----------------------------------
SELECT  $$HINT1
  0 as expenditure_item_id,
  xal.ae_line_num as line_num,
  xal.creation_date as creation_date,
  xal.created_by as created_by,
  'N/A' as transfer_status_code, 
  0 as quantity,
  'N' as billable_flag,
  ppa.program_update_date as program_update_date,
  xal.accounting_date as pa_date,
  GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  xal.accounting_date as gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date,
  'N' as reversed_flag,
  ppa.org_id as org_id,
  ppa.project_id,
  null as task_id,
  xal.currency_code as denom_currency_code,
 (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost,
 (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_burdened_cost,
  ppa.project_currency_code as project_currency_code,
  ppa.project_rate_date as project_rev_rate_date,
  ppa.project_rate_type as project_rev_rate_type,
  NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.project_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) as project_exchange_rate,
  NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) as projfunc_exchange_rate,
  null as work_type_id, 					
  jeg_get_gl_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_gl_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period(xal.accounting_date,ppa.org_id) as recvr_pa_period_name,
  ppa.projfunc_bil_rate_type as projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  xal.accounting_date as projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  ppa.projfunc_currency_code as projfunc_currency_code,  
  null as expenditure_item_date,
  (SELECT aid.expenditure_type||DECODE(PPA.segment1,'44IWSNBL','++'||AID.task_id)
	FROM xla_distribution_links XDL,
		ap_invoice_distributions_all AID
	WHERE xdl.ae_headeR_id = xal.ae_header_id
	AND xdl.ae_line_num = xal.ae_line_num
	AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST'
	AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id
	AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV')
    AND ROWNUM = 1) as expenditure_type,
  null as expenditure_org_id, 
  null as job_id, 
  'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as system_linkage_function,  
  null as inventory_item_id,
  'N/A' as unit_of_measure, 
  '0' as incurred_by_person_id,
  0 as incurred_by_org_id,
  0 as entered_by_person_id, 
  0 as vendor_id, 
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name as pa_period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name gl_period_set_name,
  null as project_role_id, 
  null as resource_org_id, 
  null as non_labor_resource, 
  null as resource_class,
  0 AS WIP_RESOURCE_ID,
  'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as line_type, 
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.projfunc_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.project_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,  
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate
                    (
                       GL_LEDGERS.currency_code
                      ,PPA.project_currency_code
                      ,XAL.accounting_date
                    ),1) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,  
  null as raw_cost_rate, 
  null as burden_cost_rate, 
  0 as bill_job_id, 
  'ELIMINATION_COST' as transaction_source, 
  pa_project_types_all.project_type_class_code, 
  '0' as x_custom, 
  null as attribute8,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost, 
  'N' as cost_burden_distributed_flag, 
  'N' as bill_hold_flag, 
  0 as burden_cost,
  null as cost_dist_rejection_code,
  null as cc_cross_charge_code, 
  null as cc_ic_processed_code, 
  'N/A' as bill_job_billing_title,
  'N/A' as attribute2,
  'N/A' as attribute5,
  'N/A' as cross_charge_type,
  jeg_get_class(ppa.project_id, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C') as control_pu,
  null as invoice_num, 
  null as invoice_date, 
  null as po_num,
  null as non_labor_resource, 
  trim(GCC_1.segment3) as charged_pu,
  null as cc_prvdr_org_id,
  null as cc_recvr_org_id, 
  null as job_id, 
  gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_curr_code, 
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) as func_burdened_cost, 
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) as func_raw_cost,
  0 as task_customer_id, 
  xal.ae_line_num,
  'COST_INTERCOMPANY' as source_type,
  xal.ae_header_id,
  NULL AS X_USER_NAME
  ,NULL AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
							   
,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE																							   								 
FROM gl_ledgers,
  pa_projects_all ppa,
  pa_project_types_all, 
  xla_ae_lines xal,
  xla_ae_headers xah,
  GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GCC_1
	  

   
																							
																																							  
																																									 
																							   
   

WHERE XAH.AE_HEADER_ID = XAL.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND (GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY')
	AND XAH.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE = 'Y'
	AND XAH.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_sTATUS_CODE = 'F'
	AND XAL.LEDGER_ID = GL_LEDGERS.LEDGER_ID
	AND XAL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GCC_1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  AND PPA.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
  AND ppa.project_type = pa_project_types_all.project_type 
  AND GL_LEDGERS.PERIOD_SET_NAME = 'JEG_STD_CAL'
  AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
	AND EXISTS
		(SELECT 1
		FROM xla_distribution_links XDL,
			ap_invoice_distributions_all AID,
			ap_invoice_lines_all AIL,
			ra_customer_trx_all RCT,
			pa_draft_invoices_all PDI,
			hr_all_organization_units ROU
		WHERE XDL.AE_HEADER_ID = XAH.AE_HEADER_ID
		AND XAL.AE_LINE_NUM = XDL.AE_LINE_NUM
		AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST'
		AND AID.invoice_id = AIL.invoice_id
		AND AID.invoice_line_number = AIL.line_number
		AND RCT.customer_trx_id = AIL.pa_cc_ar_invoice_id
		AND RCT.trx_number = PDI.ra_invoice_number
		AND RCT.org_id = PDI.org_id
		AND PPA.PROJECT_ID = AID.PROJECT_ID
		AND XDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST'
		AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 = AID.invoice_distribution_id
		AND XDL.accounting_line_code in ('JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_DR','JEG_US_FRINGE_SPLIT_IC_AP_CR', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM', 'AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV')
		AND ROU.organization_id = RCT.org_id
		) 
  AND  (PPA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  OR  XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
 --AND PPA.SEGMENT1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_NUMBER FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL)) --Added for Divestiture logic for ECR
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = PPA.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.
